content:
# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

Adjusted bead-backed project creation so prompt hydration only runs when `prompt.md` is being generated, preventing `--prompt-file` runs from failing on irrelevant `br list --json` errors. Tightened planned-elsewhere derivation so downstream dependents take precedence over shared-acceptance ownership instead of silently dropping relationship semantics through dedup, and broadened planned-elsewhere summary compaction to skip level-1 ATX headings as well as fenced blocks and scope labels. Added focused unit and CLI regressions covering prompt-override short-circuiting, dependent-vs-shared-acceptance precedence, and `# Heading` summary compaction.

## Steps

1. [Completed] Inspected the current `project create-from-bead` prompt-hydration flow, planned-elsewhere dedup behavior, and summary compaction helpers/tests to map each pending amendment to a concrete code path.
2. [Completed] Patched `src/cli/project.rs` so `--prompt-file` bypasses bead-summary loading and prompt-only context assembly, shared-acceptance expansion skips downstream dependents, and markdown heading detection treats any ATX heading level as skippable summary boilerplate.
3. [Completed] Added targeted unit and CLI regressions for dependent/shared-acceptance precedence, prompt-override success when `br list --json` fails, and level-1 heading compaction in planned-elsewhere summaries.
4. [Completed] Ran formatting and focused unit/CLI coverage for the amended prompt-generation paths and verified the new behavior end to end.

## Validation Evidence

- `cargo fmt --all` passed.
- `cargo test build_planned_elsewhere_context_ --lib -- --nocapture` passed (7 tests).
- `cargo test compact_planned_elsewhere_summary_ --lib -- --nocapture` passed (4 tests).
- `cargo test --test unit create_project_from_bead_context_ -- --nocapture` passed (13 tests).
- `cargo test project_create_from_bead_ --test cli -- --nocapture` passed (25 tests), including the new prompt-override and level-1-heading regressions.

## Outstanding Risks

- Validation was focused on the touched prompt-generation and create-from-bead paths; I did not rerun the full repository test suite or `br lint` in this remediation pass.
- The worktree still contains the unrelated untracked `.ralph-burning/` directory, which I left untouched.
- The prompt-override path now skips enriched dependency/planned-elsewhere assembly entirely; if future code starts consuming those prompt-only context fields even when an override prompt is supplied, that assumption will need to be revisited.
